title: Character Monologue Portrait
summary: Tight close-up of a contemplative character delivering a silent monologue.
prompt: A tight close-up portrait of a thoughtful young person sitting by a rainy window at dusk. They look slightly off-camera, brow knit in quiet contemplation, then take a slow breath and slightly tilt their head. Window light catches one side of their face, casting soft shadow across the other. Subtle micro-expressions, indie-film cinematography, 85mm portrait lens look.
